/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ExchangeAppMain.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExchangeAppMain.dir/src/domain/InputOrder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExchangeAppMain.dir/src/domain/OrderBook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExchangeAppMain.dir/src/services/OrderIDGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExchangeAppMain.dir/src/app/OrderProcessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExchangeAppMain.dir/src/app/FileCleanupService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExchangeAppMain.dir/src/validation/OrderValidator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExchangeAppMain.dir/src/io/ReadInputOrderCSV.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExchangeAppMain.dir/src/io/GenerateCSV.cpp.o -o ExchangeAppMain
